titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 138
GA 138
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: ουν added at 21.12 by David Parker.
changes at 7.53 and 12.39 by David Parker.
second των at 3.25 deleted by David Parker.
εφη changed to φησιν at 18.29 by David Parker.
και added at 18.18 by David Parker.
Addition by corrector at 6.32-3 added by David Parker.
7.41 block marker moved forward 4 words; correction at 7.50 deleted; and και added at 7.51 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 6.71 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 20.5 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 19.26 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Words moved from 17.8 to 17.7 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 14.22 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Sequence of correctors changed by Rachel Kevern.
Iota adscripts removed by David Parker.
Nomen sacrum tags added in 11.46, 12.22; ξ changed to χ in 15.22; spurious ινα removed in 20.7 by David Parker.
Word break in 10,31 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-Α 138Citta del Vaticano, Βibl. Vat., Vat. gr. 757 John begins Folio 268rΤranscribed by: WJΕ Τranscription begun: 11:10:2005Τranscription finished:Some conventions revised DCΡ, 15.12.05. Some formatting changes made and multiple {|L|}comm tags added by Alan Bale, 04.03.12. Errοrs identified by Alan fixed by RK 05.03.2012.F379v Αgain a possible contemporary hand takes over, and may be writing over the first handFINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103

ab.note: Perhaps the scribe momentarily thought he was writing verse 8 but didn't delete δεδωκα α when he realised his mistake.
